seoTitle: Endeavour Hills vs Enfield — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Endeavour Hills and Enfield. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Endeavour Hills vs Enfield: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Endeavour Hills and Enfield.
heading: Endeavour Hills vs Enfield — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Endeavour Hills, Victoria and Enfield, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Endeavour Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Enfield (45/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Endeavour Hills or Enfield safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Endeavour Hills has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Enfield scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Endeavour Hills scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Enfield scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Endeavour Hills or Enfield?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Endeavour Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
